text:
AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for housing need 
1 = Screened positive for housing need 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables include SR_CORE_HOUSNG_1_CD (value of 2 = Worried lose housing or 3 = No steady 
housing) and SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_SCRNG_CMPST_IND (value of 1 = Has issues with pests, mold, 
lead, heat, oven, smoke detectors, and/or water). This field is “1” if either of the two housing 
questions was positive for the need. 

Variables that start with “SR” include information
